positive: A celestial forest scene where bioluminescent, stylized flora and fauna meet geometric, abstract mountain peaks. The composition features a central clearing bathed in soft, ethereal moonlight, surrounded by giant, stylized leaves and whimsical glowing mushrooms. The style is neo-art nouveau mixed with clean vector illustration, featuring deep indigo and teal tones accented by neon cyan and lime green glowing sources. The silhouettes are crisp and graphic, suitable for a repeat pattern or large single graphic print on apparel. Strong contrast and clean lines are essential. Central composition, symmetrical balance.
